Agibuild.Fulora
Table of Contents

Namespace Agibuild.Fulora

Classes

AdapterCreatedEventArgs
AiMediaPayload

Binary payload with MIME type metadata for multimodal AI content.

AiToolAttribute

Marks a JsExportAttribute-decorated interface or method for AI tool schema generation. The source generator will emit an OpenAI-compatible function-calling JSON schema.

AotCompatibilityAttribute

Marks an assembly as validated for NativeAOT compatibility.

AppBuilderExtensions

Avalonia Avalonia.AppBuilder extensions for the Agibuild WebView.

AuthOptions
AutoUpdateOptions

Configuration options for the auto-update service.

AutoUpdateService

Runtime implementation of IAutoUpdateService. Coordinates the update lifecycle (check → download → verify → apply) via an IAutoUpdatePlatformProvider and exposes bridge events for JS consumers.

AvaloniaWebDialog

Production implementation of IWebDialog backed by an Avalonia Avalonia.Controls.Window containing a WebView control. The WebView control handles all native platform adapter creation, NativeControlHost lifecycle, and attachment automatically.

Usage: 

var dialog = new AvaloniaWebDialog();
dialog.Title = "Sign In";
dialog.Show();
await dialog.NavigateAsync(new Uri("https://example.com"));
AvaloniaWebDialogFactory

Production implementation of IWebDialogFactory that creates AvaloniaWebDialog instances backed by Avalonia Window + WebView.

Register via DI or instantiate directly: 

var factory = new AvaloniaWebDialogFactory();
using var dialog = factory.Create();
dialog.Show();
await dialog.NavigateAsync(new Uri("https://example.com"));
BridgeCallContext

Context object passed through the bridge middleware pipeline.

BridgeCallProfiler

An IBridgeTracer that collects per-method and per-service statistics for call counts, errors, and latency percentiles. Optionally delegates to an inner tracer.

BridgeDebugServer

Lightweight WebSocket server that streams IBridgeTracer events to external tools (e.g., VS Code extension). Opt-in via BridgeDebugServerOptions.Enabled. Localhost-only.

BridgeDebugServerOptions

Options for the Bridge Debug Server (WebSocket streaming of bridge events).

BridgeDevToolsEvent

Represents a single bridge call event captured for the DevTools panel.

BridgeDevToolsOverlay

An Avalonia panel that hosts the Bridge DevTools overlay, displaying real-time bridge call logs, payloads, latency metrics, and error details.

Place this in a Avalonia.Controls.Grid alongside the main WebView and call Attach(WebView, IBridgeTracer?) to wire it up: 

<Grid>
  <agw:WebView x:Name="WebView" />
  <agw:BridgeDevToolsOverlay x:Name="DevToolsOverlay"
    VerticalAlignment="Bottom" Height="300" IsVisible="False" />
</Grid>
BridgeDevToolsService

Provides the Bridge DevTools overlay for debugging bridge calls. Serves the overlay HTML and pushes events to the WebView in real-time.

BridgeErrorDiagnostic

Rich error diagnostic with error code, message, and optional actionable hint.

BridgeEventCollector

Thread-safe bounded ring buffer that collects BridgeDevToolsEvent instances. When the buffer is full, the oldest events are dropped.

BridgeEvent<T>

Runtime implementation of IBridgeEvent<T> that allows C# code to push events to JavaScript.

Declare properties as IBridgeEvent<T> on the interface, and use BridgeEvent<T> in the implementation to emit events: 

private readonly BridgeEvent<Notification> _onNew = new();
public IBridgeEvent<Notification> OnNew => _onNew;
// Push: _onNew.Emit(new Notification(...));
BridgeImportProxy

DispatchProxy implementation for JsImportAttribute interfaces. Routes every method call to the RPC service.

BridgeOptions

Per-service options for Expose<T>(T, BridgeOptions?).

BridgePluginExtensions

Extension methods for registering bridge plugins.

BridgePluginServiceDescriptor

Describes a single bridge service provided by a plugin. Use Create<T>(Func<IServiceProvider?, T>, BridgeOptions?) to create descriptors with compile-time type safety.

BridgeProxyAttribute

Assembly-level attribute linking a JsImportAttribute interface to its source-generated proxy implementation class.

BridgeRegistrationAttribute

Assembly-level attribute linking a JsExportAttribute interface to its source-generated IBridgeServiceRegistration<T> implementation.

BridgeTelemetryTracer

An IBridgeTracer that auto-collects bridge call metrics via ITelemetryProvider. Tracks latency on call end and errors on call error. Optionally delegates to an inner tracer.

CompositeBridgeTracer

An IBridgeTracer that holds multiple tracers and forwards each callback to all. Exceptions from one tracer are caught and do not prevent other tracers from receiving events. NullBridgeTracer instances are filtered out and not included.

CompositeTelemetryProvider

A telemetry provider that forwards all calls to multiple inner providers. Exceptions from one provider do not affect others.

ConsoleTelemetryProvider

Telemetry provider that writes events to stdout (useful for development/debugging). Serves as a reference implementation for custom providers.

ContentFilterResult

Result of a content filter operation.

ContextMenuRequestedEventArgs
CustomSchemeRegistration
DevToolsPanelTracer

An IBridgeTracer that records all bridge events into a BridgeEventCollector for the DevTools debug overlay. Optionally delegates to an inner tracer so that logging/other tracing is preserved.

DownloadRequestedEventArgs
DragDropBridgeService

Bridge service implementation that exposes drag-and-drop events to JavaScript.

DragDropPayload

Payload for drag-and-drop operations between native and web contexts.

DragEventArgs

Event args for drag enter/over events. Effect can be set by the handler.

DropEventArgs

Event args for drop completion.

EnvironmentRequestedEventArgs
FileDropInfo

Metadata for a file in a drag-drop payload.

FindInPageOptions
FindInPageResult
GlobalShortcutBinding

Binding definition for a global shortcut: a user-defined ID with a key + modifier combination.

GlobalShortcutResult

Result of a global shortcut operation.

GlobalShortcutService

Manages OS-level global hotkey registration with policy governance and lifecycle management. Delegates actual OS calls to an IGlobalShortcutPlatformProvider.

GlobalShortcutTriggeredEvent

Event payload pushed to JS when a registered global shortcut is triggered.

JsExportAttribute

Marks an interface whose C# implementation is exposed to JavaScript. The Source Generator (or RuntimeBridgeService) registers RPC handlers for each method, making them callable from JS via window.agWebView.bridge.{ServiceName}.{methodName}().

JsImportAttribute

Marks an interface whose methods are implemented in JavaScript. The Source Generator (or RuntimeBridgeService) creates a C# proxy that forwards each call to JS via rpc.InvokeAsync("{ServiceName}.{methodName}", params).

JsonFileConfigProvider

An IConfigProvider that reads configuration from a local JSON file. Supports refresh to reload the file. Thread-safe.

LoggingBridgeTracer

Default tracer that logs all bridge calls via ILogger. Attach to Agibuild.Fulora.RuntimeBridgeService for structured call tracing.

MauiWebViewHostOptions

Options for configuring a MAUI WebView host.

MethodProfileStats

Aggregated statistics for a single bridge method.

MockBridgeService

A mock implementation of IBridgeService for unit testing. Allows testing ViewModels and services that depend on Bridge without a real WebView.

Deliverable 1.5: MockBridge for consumer unit testing.

NavigationCompletedEventArgs
NavigationStartingEventArgs
NewWindowRequestedEventArgs
NullBridgeTracer

A no-op tracer that discards all events. Used when no tracing is configured.

NullTelemetryProvider

A no-op telemetry provider that discards all events.

PdfPrintOptions
PermissionRequestedEventArgs
PluginManifest

Represents the fulora-plugin.json manifest embedded in Fulora plugin NuGet packages. Provides machine-readable metadata for compatibility checking and plugin discovery.

RateLimit

Defines a sliding-window rate limit: at most MaxCalls calls per Window.

RemoteConfigProvider

Config provider that fetches from a remote HTTP endpoint and merges with a local fallback. Remote values override local values.

ScriptResultHelper

Utility for normalizing JavaScript execution results returned by browser engines. WebView2's ExecuteScriptAsync returns JSON-encoded strings (e.g. "null" for null/undefined, ""hello"" for "hello"). This helper decodes such values to raw strings expected by the V1 adapter contract.

ServiceProfileStats

Aggregated statistics for a bridge service (all methods).

ServiceWorkerOptions
ServiceWorkerRegistrar

Generates and injects service worker registration and implementation scripts for offline support in WebView-hosted SPAs.

SharedStateStore

Thread-safe shared state store with last-writer-wins (LWW) conflict resolution. Each entry tracks a timestamp; stale writes are silently ignored.

SpaAssetHotUpdateResult

Result for signed SPA asset package operations.

SpaAssetHotUpdateService

Signed package installer + activation/rollback orchestrator for SPA assets.

SpaBootstrapOptions

Options for WebViewBootstrapExtensions.BootstrapSpaAsync. Encapsulates dev/prod navigation, bridge service registration, and error handling.

SpaBootstrapProfileExceptionScope

Metadata that marks an explicit exception scope for profile-level customization. This metadata is consumed by governance and diagnostics to track approved escape-hatch usage.

SpaBootstrapProfileExtension

Represents an explicit profile extension hook applied during bridge configuration. Extensions are evaluated in declared order.

SpaBootstrapProfileOptions

Profile-level bootstrap options that wrap SpaBootstrapOptions and add explicit extension hooks plus governance metadata.

SpaBootstrapProfileTeardown

Represents a lifecycle teardown callback owned by profile bootstrap. Teardowns execute in declaration order when the host adapter is destroyed.

SpaHostingExtensions

Extension methods for configuring SPA hosting.

SpaHostingOptions

Configures SPA hosting within the WebView. Supports serving embedded resources (production) or proxying to a dev server (development) via a custom app:// scheme.

StateChangedEventArgs

Event arguments for state change notifications.

ThemeChangedEvent

Event payload pushed to JS when the OS theme changes.

ThemeInfo

Snapshot of the current OS theme state.

TransparencyEffectiveState

Effective transparency state as resolved by the platform provider.

UpdateDownloadProgress

Progress information for an ongoing download.

UpdateInfo

Describes an available application update.

UpdateResult

Result of an update check or lifecycle operation.

VelopackAutoUpdateProvider

Auto-update provider that works with a generic update feed URL. Compatible with Velopack-style releases.{channel}.json feeds and simple custom JSON feeds.

WebAuthBroker

Concrete implementation of IWebAuthBroker that opens a IWebDialog to perform the OAuth authentication flow.

Flow: 1. Create an ephemeral WebDialog via IWebDialogFactory. 2. Navigate to AuthorizeUri. 3. Listen for NavigationStarted to detect the callback URI. 4. On match: close dialog, return WebAuthResult with Success. 5. On user close: return UserCancel. 6. On timeout: return Timeout.

WebAuthBrokerWithSemantics

Decorates an IWebAuthBroker to enforce v1 baseline contract semantics.

WebAuthCallbackMatcher

Helpers for matching web authentication callback URIs.

WebAuthResult
WebDialog

Runtime implementation of IWebDialog. Wraps a WebViewCore and delegates window management to a IDialogHost.

WebMessageBridgeOptions

Configuration options for enabling the web message bridge.

WebMessageReceivedEventArgs
WebResourceRequestedEventArgs
WebView

An Avalonia control that embeds a platform-native WebView.

Usage in XAML: 

<agw:WebView Source="https://example.com" />
WebViewBootstrapExtensions

Extension methods for bootstrapping SPA navigation and bridge registration on IWebView.

WebViewCookie
WebViewCore

Core runtime implementation of IWebView over a platform adapter.

WebViewEnvironment

Global configuration for the Agibuild WebView components.

Call Initialize(ILoggerFactory?) once at application startup so that all WebView controls automatically receive shared services.

WebViewEnvironmentOptions

Default implementation of IWebViewEnvironmentOptions.

WebViewMessage

A message delivered through the WebView message bus.

WebViewMessageBus

Thread-safe implementation of IWebViewMessageBus for cross-WebView communication. Uses ConcurrentDictionary<TKey, TValue> for topic→subscribers and dispatches to all matching handlers.

WebViewNavigationException
WebViewNetworkException
WebViewOperationFailure
WebViewOverlayHost

Manages a transparent companion window for rendering Avalonia controls above a WebView. Uses a real borderless Avalonia Avalonia.Controls.Window as a child of the parent window, positioned to exactly cover the WebView bounds.

WebViewRpcException
WebViewScriptException
WebViewServiceCollectionExtensions

Extension methods for registering Avalonia WebDialog and WebAuthBroker services.

Call services.AddWebViewDialogServices() to register:

  • IWebDialogFactory → AvaloniaWebDialogFactory (singleton)
  • IWebAuthBroker → WebAuthBroker (transient)

Note: Call services.AddWebView() first if you also need the base IWebView factory and dispatcher registrations.

WebViewShortcutRouter

Routes keyboard shortcuts to WebView command and DevTools actions. When a GlobalShortcutService is provided, window-local bindings take priority over global shortcuts for the same key combination.

WebViewSslException
WebViewTimeoutException
WindowAppearanceRequest

Request payload for applying window appearance changes.

WindowChromeMetrics

Host window chrome metrics relevant for web layout.

WindowSafeInsets

Insets required by host chrome/safe-area layout.

WindowShellCapabilities

Host capabilities and effective shell-window composition state.

WindowShellSettings

Requested shell-window settings from web content.

WindowShellState

Applied shell-window state returned to web content.

Structs

WebMessageDropDiagnostic
WebMessageEnvelope
WebMessagePolicyDecision
WebViewShortcutAction

Routed action payload for a keyboard shortcut.

WebViewShortcutBinding

Shortcut binding from key + modifiers to a routed action.

Interfaces

IAiContentFilter

Pluggable content filter for AI input/output safety. Implementations are composed into an ordered pipeline via DI.

IAndroidWebViewPlatformHandle
IAppleWKWebViewPlatformHandle
IAutoUpdatePlatformProvider

Platform-specific provider for auto-update operations. Implement this interface to supply update mechanics for each target platform.

IAutoUpdateService

Provides application auto-update lifecycle: check, download, verify, and apply updates. Registered via Bridge.Expose<IAutoUpdateService>(impl).

IBridgeEventCollector

Collects bridge call events in a bounded buffer for DevTools consumption.

IBridgeEvent<T>

Marker interface for typed event channels on JsExportAttribute interfaces. Properties of this type on a [JsExport] interface are automatically wired as push event channels from C# to JavaScript by the source generator.

IBridgeMiddleware

ASP.NET Core–style middleware for intercepting bridge RPC calls (logging, auth, error transform, etc.).

IBridgePlugin

Marker interface for bridge plugins. Implementations provide a static manifest of bridge services that can be registered in one call via UsePlugin<TPlugin>(IBridgeService, IServiceProvider?).

Uses C# static abstract members for NativeAOT-safe compile-time discovery. The implementing class is never instantiated — it acts purely as a manifest.

IBridgeService

Type-safe bridge service for exposing C# services to JavaScript and importing JS services into C#.

Use Expose<T>(T, BridgeOptions?) with JsExportAttribute interfaces to register C# implementations callable from JS.

Use GetProxy<T>() with JsImportAttribute interfaces to obtain a typed C# proxy that calls JS methods.

IBridgeServiceRegistration<T>

Implemented by source-generated registration classes for JsExportAttribute interfaces. Provides reflection-free handler registration, JS stub generation, and method metadata.

IBridgeTracer

Optional tracer for Bridge method calls. Implement this interface to observe all RPC traffic for debugging, performance monitoring, or visualization.

ICommandManager
IConfigProvider

Provides remote configuration and feature flag values.

ICookieManager
IDialogHost

Abstraction for the dialog window host (platform window management). Kept host-framework-neutral to enable unit testing with mocks.

IDragDropBridgeService

Bridge service that exposes drag-and-drop events to JavaScript. Events are delivered as streaming callbacks via bridge import proxies.

IGlobalShortcutPlatformProvider

Platform abstraction for OS-level global hotkey registration. Each platform provides its own implementation (Windows RegisterHotKey, macOS CGEvent, etc.).

IGlobalShortcutService

Provides OS-level global hotkey registration, lifecycle management, and activation event dispatch. Registered via Bridge.Expose<IGlobalShortcutService>(impl).

IGtkWebViewPlatformHandle
IMauiWebViewHost

Contract for hosting an Agibuild.Fulora WebView in a .NET MAUI application.

INativeHandle
INativeWebViewHandleProvider
IPlatformThemeProvider

Abstracts OS-specific theme detection. Implement per platform for accent color, high-contrast detection, and theme change notifications.

ISharedStateStore

Cross-WebView reactive key-value state store with last-writer-wins conflict resolution. All WebViews sharing the same store instance see a consistent view of state.

ISpaHostingWebView

Marks an IWebView implementation that can enable framework SPA hosting.

ITelemetryProvider

Provides telemetry and crash reporting capabilities.

IThemeService

Provides OS theme information and real-time theme change notifications. Registered via Bridge.Expose<IThemeService>(impl).

ITopLevelWindow
IWebAuthBroker
IWebDialog
IWebDialogFactory
IWebMessageDropDiagnosticsSink
IWebMessagePolicy
IWebView
IWebViewDispatcher
IWebViewEnvironmentOptions
IWebViewMessageBus

Message bus for cross-WebView communication. Allows publishing and subscribing to topics across multiple WebView instances, with the host runtime acting as mediator.

IWebViewRpcService
IWindowChromeProvider

Abstracts platform-specific window chrome operations (transparency, metrics, appearance). Concrete implementations (e.g. Avalonia) add window tracking on the concrete type.

IWindowShellService

Framework-level shell-window service contract. Provides snapshot, update, and stream access to the global shell-window state (theme, transparency, chrome metrics).

IWindowsWebView2PlatformHandle

Enums

BridgeCallDirection

Direction of a bridge call.

BridgeCallPhase

Phase of a bridge call lifecycle.

BridgeErrorCode

Specific bridge call error codes with actionable diagnostic information.

ContentFilterAction

The action a content filter takes on content.

ContextMenuMediaType
DragDropEffects

Drag-and-drop effect flags for native ↔ web interoperability.

GlobalShortcutResultStatus

Outcome of a global shortcut registration or unregistration operation.

NavigationCompletedStatus
OverlayHitTestResult

Result of hit-testing a point against the overlay.

PermissionState
ServiceWorkerCacheStrategy
ShortcutKey

Virtual key codes for global shortcut registration. Subset of commonly used keys across all platforms.

ShortcutModifiers

Modifier key flags for global shortcut registration.

TransparencyLevel

Platform transparency composition levels.

UpdateStatus

Status of an auto-update operation.

WebAuthStatus
WebMessageDropReason
WebViewCommand
WebViewOperationFailureCategory
WebViewPermissionKind
WebViewShortcutActionKind

Action type routed from a keyboard shortcut.

Delegates

BridgeCallDelegate

Delegate representing the next step in the middleware pipeline (or the terminal handler).

Agibuild.Fulora — Cross-platform Hybrid App Framework
